strengths: ~17 years of broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with genuine polyglot depth
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq plus a long-running open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective) showing builder initiative
Public knowledge-sharer — FOSS4G conference talk, TDD/Selenium workshops, and training courses demonstrate the mentorship instinct the role requires
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (MCP tooling since April 2025 only); no ML, model development, or recognized AI platform ownership at the level this role demands
No evidence of director-level strategic influence, executive customer advisory, or cross-organizational engineering leadership
Cloud experience is incidental (AWS CDK at one employer for pricing logic); no cloud platform strategy or architecture at scale
response.justification: The candidate has a solid ~17-year full-stack career with genuine technical breadth, open-source initiative, and community teaching, but falls well short of the Principal/Director AI Strategy bar. AI involvement is limited to roughly two months of MCP tooling work with no ML background, no AI platform ownership, and no history of advising strategic customers on AI adoption. The role requires recognized external AI thought leadership and director-level strategic scope — neither is evidenced in this resume.
